heading: Fraud, waste, and abuse controls
label: 795 Fraud, waste, and abuse controls
notes: References in TextFor the amendments made by this section, referred to in subsec. (b), see Codification note below.
CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (c) of amended , The Public Health and Welfare.section 696 of Pub. L. 109–295section 696 of Pub. L. 109–295section 5174 of Title 42
amendments: References in TextFor the amendments made by this section, referred to in subsec. (b), see Codification note below.
CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (c) of amended , The Public Health and Welfare.section 696 of Pub. L. 109–295section 696 of Pub. L. 109–295section 5174 of Title 42

children.text: all programs within the Agency administering Federal disaster relief assistance develop and maintain proper internal management controls to prevent and detect fraud, waste, and abuse;
application databases used by the Agency to collect information on eligible recipients must record disbursements;
such tracking is designed to highlight and identify ineligible applications; and
the databases used to collect information from applications for such assistance must be integrated with disbursements and payment records.

children.heading: Audits and reviews required
children.label: b Audits and reviews required
children.text: The Administrator shall ensure that any database or similar application processing system for Federal disaster relief assistance programs administered by the Agency undergoes a review by the Inspector General of the Agency to determine the existence and implementation of such internal controls required under this section and the amendments made by this section.
